From: alice.tran@ssc-spc.gc.ca
To: j.henderson@techsupplier.ca
Subject: Network Switch Delivery — Timeline Confirmation
Date: March 6, 2026

Jason,

Following up on your message from March 2 — can you please provide an
updated delivery commitment for the Cisco Catalyst 9500 switches?

Specifically, we need to know:
1. The confirmed delivery date for the Gatineau (Site A) order of 24 units.
2. Whether the BGP routing modules (C9500-NM-2Q) are included in the
   revised shipment.
3. The tracking number once the shipment is dispatched from your warehouse.

The network equipment arrival date directly determines when we can begin
staging and pre-configuration activities at Site A. As discussed, we need
a minimum of 5 business days for hardware staging and testing before the
migration window opens.

Please confirm by end of day March 7.

Thanks,
Alice Tran
Project Manager, NGIS Phase 3
